title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 633.105 - Regional centers to secure services
text:
633.105.  Regional centers to secure services. — The regional centers shall be the entry and exit points in each region responsible for securing comprehensive intellectual disability and developmental disability services for clients of the department.  The center shall carry out this responsibility either through contracts purchasing the required services or through the direct provision of the services if community-based services are not available, economical or as effective for the provision of the services.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1064)
